query: Nissan offers and finance deals for new models in Japan today
brand_topic_category: Value, offers, finance and total cost of ownership

request_params_without_api_key.q: Nissan offers and finance deals for new models in Japan today

search_parameters.q: Nissan offers and finance deals for new models in Japan today

text_blocks.snippet: Nissan Japan offers a maximum purchase support cash incentive of up to 500,000 yen for new models through its current active national promotional campaign. The program features a lottery for vehicle purchase funds combined with dealer test-drive bonuses and optional equipment credits.
snippet_highlighted_words: Nissan Japan offers a maximum purchase support cash incentive of up to 500,000 yen

text_blocks.snippet: Nissan's purchasing campaigns in Japan emphasize residential value financing and cash-back incentives:

list.snippet: New Vehicle Purchase Gift Campaign: A national lottery running until August 31, 2026, awards 300,000 yen in purchase funds to 200 winners. An additional "Double Chance" lottery provides 100,000 yen to 5,000 participants who test-drive a vehicle at a dealership after entering online.

Optional Equipment Upgrades: Buyers of new registered passenger vehicles receive an extra 100,000 yen option credit, while Kei car buyers receive 50,000 yen. Combined with the lottery, the total discount reaches up to 500,000 yen.

Residual Value Credit Plan (Zanketsu): Nissan Financial Services handles targeted low-interest residual-value lease structures. These plans include promotional cashbacks covering the equivalent of the first 6 months of interest payments on eligible new models.

P.O.P (Personal Option Plan) Subscription: A flat-rate consumer car lease or subscription setup allows individuals or businesses to upgrade to a brand-new vehicle every 3 years under a 5-year contract. The current special feature includes cash-back incentives specifically for the Serena e-4ORCE model.

text_blocks.snippet: The promotional campaigns apply to Nissan’s latest core domestic lineup:

list.snippet: Electric Vehicles (EVs): The Nissan Ariya crossover and the high-volume Nissan Sakura Kei EV.
e-POWER Hybrids: The freshly updated Serena minivan (including e-4ORCE variants), X-Trail SUV, and Note Aura.
Sports Cars: The high-end Skyline sedan and the Fairlady Z.

text_blocks.snippet: If you would like to explore specific payment tiers, please let me know:

list.snippet: Which specific vehicle model you are interested in?
Your preferred loan or lease duration (e.g., 3 years or 5 years)?
The intended down payment amount you plan to allocate?

serpapi_response.reconstructed_markdown:
[Nissan Japan](https://www.nissan.co.jp/) offers a maximum purchase support cash incentive of up to 500,000 yen for new models through its current active national promotional campaign. The program features a lottery for vehicle purchase funds combined with dealer test\-drive bonuses and optional equipment credits. [1] [2] [6]

### Active Financial Campaigns & Deals

Nissan's purchasing campaigns in Japan emphasize residential value financing and cash\-back incentives: [3] [5]

- New Vehicle Purchase Gift Campaign: A national lottery running until August 31, 2026, awards 300,000 yen in purchase funds to 200 winners. An additional "Double Chance" lottery provides 100,000 yen to 5,000 participants who test\-drive a vehicle at a dealership after entering online.
- Optional Equipment Upgrades: Buyers of new registered passenger vehicles receive an extra 100,000 yen option credit, while Kei car buyers receive 50,000 yen. Combined with the lottery, the total discount reaches up to 500,000 yen.
- Residual Value Credit Plan \(Zanketsu\): Nissan Financial Services handles targeted low\-interest residual\-value lease structures. These plans include promotional cashbacks covering the equivalent of the first 6 months of interest payments on eligible new models.
- P.O.P \(Personal Option Plan\) Subscription: A flat\-rate consumer car lease or subscription setup allows individuals or businesses to upgrade to a brand\-new vehicle every 3 years under a 5\-year contract. The current special feature includes cash\-back incentives specifically for the Serena e\-4ORCE model.

### Eligible New Models

The promotional campaigns apply to Nissan’s latest core domestic lineup: [2] [6]

- Electric Vehicles \(EVs\): The Nissan Ariya crossover and the high\-volume Nissan Sakura Kei EV.
- e\-POWER Hybrids: The freshly updated Serena minivan \(including e\-4ORCE variants\), X\-Trail SUV, and Note Aura.
- Sports Cars: The high\-end Skyline sedan and the Fairlady Z.

If you would like to explore specific payment tiers, please let me know:

- Which specific vehicle model you are interested in?
- Your preferred loan or lease duration \(e.g., 3 years or 5 years\)?
- The intended down payment amount you plan to allocate?
